ogTitle: Woronora vs Woronora Dam: Climate Safety

heading: Woronora vs Woronora Dam — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Woronora, New South Wales and Woronora Dam, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Woronora has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Woronora Dam (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Woronora or Woronora Dam safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Woronora has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Woronora Dam scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Woronora scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Woronora Dam scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Woronora or Woronora Dam?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Woronora has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
